Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to take a list of 18 interleaved hospital process events without explicit case IDs and group them into distinct patient cases based on attributes like patient demographics timestamps activities and logical flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Structure Each line has timestamp activity resource department patient age patient gender additional info Key differentiators for grouping patient age patient gender and department sometimes timestamp helps with ordering

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Event 1 080513 Register ER Age 45 Male Candidate Case Lets call this Case A 45M Event 2 080702 Register ER Age 62 Female Candidate Case Different patient Lets call this Case B 62F Event 3 080715 Register Surgery Age 28 Male Candidate Case Different patient Lets call this Case C 28M

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Current Status Case A 45M ER Case B 62F ER Case C 28M Surgery

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Synthesize and Verify Cases Case 1 The 45 Year Old Male Events 1 4 7 12 15 Flow Register ER Triage ER X ray Radiology Consult ER Discharge ER Logic Check Makes sense Patient came in got triaged had a leg X ray saw a doctor for a fracture diagnosis and left

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 The 62 Year Old Female Events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Flow Register ER Triage ER Lab Request ER Lab Complete Lab Consult ER Prescription ER Discharge ER Logic Check Makes sense Patient came in triaged blood work sent to lab results came back doctor diagnosed infection prescribed antibiotics patient left

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 The 28 Year Old Male Events 3 6 9 13 16 18 Flow Register Surgery Consult Surgery Prep Surgery Surgery Surgery Recovery Surgery Discharge Surgery Logic Check Makes sense Scheduled knee surgery Registered saw doctor prepped had surgery went to recovery discharged

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Formatting Present the findings clearly grouping the specific event numbers under inferred Case IDs Case A Case B Case C and summarizing the patient profile for each

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refinement of Output Use the attributes Age Gender as the primary key for identification List the events in chronological order within each case to show the process flow Provide a brief summary of the clinical journey for context Self Correction during drafting Did I miss any events Total events 18 Case A count 5 Case B count 7 Case C count 6 5 7 6 18 All accounted for
